Strong at Home

No-equipment home workouts for real life

No-Equipment Workout: 20 Minutes to Full Body Fitness

2026-07-08

This efficient 20-minute bodyweight workout targets every major muscle group.

Warm-Up (2 minutes)

Arm circles, leg kicks, and dynamic stretching.

Main Workout (16 minutes)

Bodyweight squats, push-ups, lunges, and plank variations.

Cool-Down (2 minutes)

Gentle stretching and breathing exercises.

No equipment needed—just your body and determination!

This article is for general informational purposes only and is not medical advice. It is not a substitute for professional diagnosis or treatment. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider about your individual situation, especially before making significant changes to your diet or exercise routine.
